title: Automated Plate Filling Protocol for 96-Well Plates
author: Opentrons
materials: Upload custom labware definition, if needed.
Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: will be added to columns 1-6 of each plate
steps.instruction: will be added to columns 1-6 of each plate. Next, 10µL of Reagent 2 (Polymixin B

steps.title: will be added to columns 6-12 of each plate
steps.instruction: will be added to columns 6-12 of each plate. Finally, 10µL of Reagent 3 (Growth Media Gamma) will be added to all of the wells. If you have any questions about this protocol, please email our Applications Engineering team at [protocols@opentrons.com](mailto:protocols@opentrons.com). --- To purchase tips, reagents, or pipettes, please visit our [online store](https://shop.opentrons.com/) or contact our sales team at [info@opentrons.com](mailto:info@opentrons.com) * [Opentrons OT-2](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-robot/products/ot-2) * [Opentrons OT-2 Run App (Version 3.21.0 or later)](https://opentrons.com/ot-app/) * [Opentrons p20 8-Channel Pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-robot/products/8-channel-electronic-pipette) (on the right mount) * [Opentrons 20µL Filter Tips](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips) * [NEST 96-Well Deep Well Plate](https://labware.opentrons.com/nest_96_wellplate_2ml_deep?category=wellPlate) * HiMic 96-Well Plates, 400µL * Reagents --- **Deck Layout** Slot 11: [NEST 96-Well Deep Well Plate](https://labware.opentrons.com/nest_96_wellplate_2ml_deep?category=wellPlate) A

steps.instruction: HiMic 96-Well Plates, 400µL **Using the customizations field (below), set up your protocol.** * **Number of Plates**: Specify the number of plates to fill during the protocol.
